title: About the Author
text: About the Author Barbara Park is no stranger to occupational indecision. When she was in kindergarten, she wanted to be a dancer. Or an ice skater. Or a wallpaper hanger. “No matter how mediocre I was at something, my mother always thought I was great,” says Barbara Park. “When I learned to skate backwards, she was ready to sign me up for the Ice Capades.” Barbara Park finally decided to become a writer, and thousands of readers are glad she did. She has received many awards for her hilarious children’s books, including seven children’s choice awards and four Parents’ Choice awards. She lives in Arizona with her husband, Richard, and their two sons, Steven and David.
